# Addendum C - Collateral / LTV Policy and Risk Appetite Note

## LTV Rule
LTV <= 0.80 is the standard collateral coverage threshold.

## Classification
- LTV <= 0.70: preferred
- 0.70 < LTV <= 0.80: standard approval eligible
- 0.80 < LTV <= 0.90: escalation required
- LTV > 0.90: high-risk review

## Risk Appetite Note
The BRD supports the VaR/ES framework, but does not set 0.12 as a cutoff. For the deterministic Shadow benchmark, the adopted risk appetite cutoff is:

10-day 95% VaR <= 0.12

This is a benchmark calibration rule and should be cited to this addendum, not to the BRD.

## Adverse-action mapping
- AA03: Collateral coverage / LTV exceeds standard eligibility threshold
- AA04: Portfolio / market risk appetite threshold exceeded
